tweets.text:
The psychology of viral products:

• Status: 'I'm in the know'
• Belonging: 'I'm part of this'
• Curiosity: 'What's everyone talking about?'
• FOMO: 'I might miss out'

Design for emotions, not features.

Algorithmic stablecoins: What went wrong?

• UST/Terra: Death spiral, $40B wiped
• Basis Cash: Failed to maintain peg
• Fei Protocol: Complex, underperformed

Pure algorithmic = High risk. Collateral matters.

Eurozone digital euro status:

• Investigation phase: 2021-2023 ✓
• Preparation phase: 2023-2026 (current)
• Decision: 2026 (?)
• Potential launch: 2028+

Moving carefully. Big implications for EU economy.

Flash loans in DeFi:

• Borrow millions without collateral
• Must repay in same transaction
• Use cases: Arbitrage, liquidations, refinancing
• Risk: Smart contract bugs

Atomic finance. Powerful and dangerous.

Web3 infrastructure layers:

1. Layer 1: Settlement (Ethereum, Solana)
2. Layer 2: Scaling (Arbitrum, Optimism)
3. Application: Wallets, DEXs, protocols
4. Interface: dApps users interact with

Understanding the stack matters.

Institutional crypto adoption indicators:

• BlackRock Bitcoin ETF: $10B+ inflows
• MicroStrategy: 200K+ BTC held
• Fidelity, Schwab offering crypto
• Corporations adding BTC to treasury

The institutional era is here.

Product-market fit signals:

• Users are pulling the product from you
• Retention curves flatten
• Organic growth exceeds paid
• Users recruit other users

Don't scale until you feel the pull.

Cross-border payments with stablecoins:

Traditional: 3-5 days, $25-50 fees, 3-5% FX spread
Stablecoins: 5 minutes, <$1 fees, minimal spread

The value proposition is obvious. Adoption follows utility.

CBDC interoperability challenges:

• Different tech stacks
• Regulatory divergence
• Cross-border settlement
• FX conversion

Project mBridge (BIS): Testing multi-currency CBDC platform.

Crypto cycles: Where are we?

• 2011: First bubble
• 2013-2014: Mt. Gox era
• 2017-2018: ICO boom
• 2021-2022: DeFi/NFT summer
• 2024-2025: ETF/Institutional era

History rhymes. Adapt accordingly.
